name: Caribou Picadillo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, sauté onion and garlic in the oil until onion is golden.
2. Add ground caribou, chile flakes, oregano, cumin, coriander, and cloves. Stir occasionally until caribou is browned.
3. Mix in tomatoes, vinegar, raisins, salt, and pepper. Cook over low heat until liquid is reduced by half.
4. Adjust seasonings as needed and serve.
